---
name: teacherAdminMigrationStatus
description: Capture module migration status emphasizing admin/teacher focus.
argument-hint: Optional: scope notes or target modules
---
Summarize migration status by module, focusing on teacher/admin scope. Use the following baseline:
- Dashboard (student/teacher/admin): partial migration; prioritize teacher/admin.
- Reports: partial migration (flagged); legacy still in use.
- Settings: partial migration (flagged); legacy still in use.
- Admin: users/students/teachers/project-pairs: legacy-first.
- Admin: document queues (KP02/KP03/system test/exam results): legacy-first.
- Upload roster / bulk tools: legacy-first.
Provide a concise status list and note which areas should be migrated next.
